title: Aftercut AIO LFWMK 80m2 Spreader UK
features: Use from May to August when weeds & moss are actively growing
description: Product Description Aftercut All-In-One is a triple action lawn treatment that greens and feeds your lawn, whilst controlling weeds and moss. The effective formulation kills more than 12 type of common weeds on the lawn. Its balanced nutrient levels deliver lush results and a stronger lawn from root to tip. Directions Use on established lawns (6+ months old). Apply from May to August when grass, weeds and moss are actively growing. Allow weeds to grow 3 days before treatment to maximise leaf area for weedkiller absorption. Apply on a calm day when the soil is moist and the grass is dry. DO NOT use during drought or freezing windy conditions or before heavy rain. Safety Warning KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN AND PETS. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection. Do not eat, drink, or smoke while handling. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice and show the container or label. Dispose of empty container in accordance with local regulations. Do not contaminate water sources. Do not use when rain is expected within 24 hours. Manufacturer Contact Information Westland Horticulture Limited, 14 Granville Industrial Estate, Granville Road, Dungannon, Co Tyrone, BT70 1NJ. See more
